component.author: Cesanta Software Limited
component.name: mongoose
component.description: Two-file C/C++ embedded networking library. HTTP, WebSocket, MQTT, TLS 1.3, OTA firmware updates, device dashboard. Runs on microcontrollers and desktop OS.

components.author: Kenneth MacKay
components.name: micro-ecc
components.description: ECC point operations on GF(p) curves (secp256r1). Used by Mongoose built-in TLS 1.3 for ECDH key exchange and ECDSA signatures. Source: src/tls_uecc.c, src/tls_uecc.h.

components.author: Thomas Pornin
components.name: BearSSL RSA (i31 backend)
components.description: RSA bigint arithmetic derived from BearSSL's i31 backend. Used by Mongoose built-in TLS 1.3 for RSA certificate parsing and verification. Source: src/tls_rsa.c.

components.author: Cryptography Research, Inc. / Mike Hamburg
components.name: STROBE x25519 (adapted)
components.description: X25519 Diffie-Hellman function adapted from the STROBE project. Used by Mongoose built-in TLS 1.3 for ECDH key exchange. Source: src/tls_x25519.c.

components.author: Steve Reid
components.name: SHA-1
components.description: Public domain SHA-1 implementation. Used by Mongoose for WebSocket handshake (RFC 6455). Source: src/sha1.c.

components.author: Brad Conte
components.name: SHA-256 (crypto-algorithms)
components.description: Public domain SHA-256 implementation. Used by Mongoose for TLS certificate hashing and MQTT. Source: src/sha256.c.

components.author: Colin Plumb
components.name: MD5
components.description: Public domain MD5 implementation (no copyright claimed). Used by Mongoose for HTTP Digest authentication. Source: src/md5.c.
